title: Vitis pulcherrima

taxonomy: Vitis pulcherrima is a species of grapevine in the family Vitaceae. It belongs to the genus Vitis, which comprises approximately 60 species of grapevines. The genus Vitis is further classified under the order Vitales, in the subclass Rosidae of the class Magnoliopsida. This classification places Vitis pulcherrima within the broader group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. As a member of the Vitaceae family, Vitis pulcherrima is closely related to other grapevine species.
